description: Designed and built a full-featured Human Resource Management System for a government agency. The system handles employee records, payroll, leave management, and automated document generation for 200+ staff across multiple departments.
highlights: Built 12 core modules from scratch using Laravel + Livewire
Implemented Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for 5 user roles
Created Excel bulk import for employee onboarding
Automated generation of official government documents
Deployed and maintained in a production government environment

description: Developed a live production school management system currently used by an active educational institution. The system manages student enrollment, PTA payments, grade promotion, report cards, and parent communications.
highlights: Built and deployed a fully live production system
Implemented PTA payment management with receipt generation
Generated official report cards and academic documents
System is actively used in daily school operations

description: Working as an independent full stack developer building web applications, dashboards, REST APIs, and mobile apps for various clients. Focus on Laravel, React, and AI-integrated solutions.
highlights: Built TalentFlow ATS with AI-powered resume parsing
Developed English Coach AI mobile app (React Native + Gemini)
Built multiple admin dashboards and REST APIs
Integrated AI capabilities into client projects

description: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology. Focused on software development, database management, and web technologies. Capstone project involved building a web-based information system.
highlights: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology
